ui_response.content_summary: Copilot returned full answer about Korean Alphabet Day (한글날) with bullet points about history, significance, and holiday status

network_analysis.reason: DevTools was on Sources tab instead of Network tab during test execution
network_analysis.note: Unable to verify if Etap intercepted the request or if it went directly to Microsoft

diagnosis.likely_cause: Either Etap is not intercepting M365 Copilot requests, or Etap is intercepting but passing through without injecting warning
diagnosis.evidence: Normal AI response with full content about 한글날 was displayed — no warning text visible
action_needed: Re-test with DevTools Network tab active to verify Etap interception
Check if substrate.office.com or copilot.microsoft.com API endpoints are registered in Etap APF database
If intercepted, check why warning is not being injected into the response
